use_cases: Voice-activated AI assistant interface for chatbot applications
Real-time audio recording controls with visual feedback for SaaS products
Siri-style voice command interface for smart home or IoT applications
Interactive voice demo component for AI/ML product showcases
Accessible voice input controls for hands-free web applications
ai_summary: A modern Siri-style voice chat interface component featuring real-time audio visualization with animated waveforms, ambient particle effects, and state-based UI feedback for listening, processing, and speaking modes. Includes microphone and volume controls with a glass-morphism aesthetic and smooth animations powered by Framer Motion. Designed for AI assistants and voice-controlled SaaS applications.
